name: shot_id
description: SofaScore shot incident ID

name: match_id
description: FK → sofascore_matches.match_id

name: match_date
description: Partition key — match date

name: match_round
description: Clustering key

name: tournament_id
description: SofaScore tournament ID

name: season_id
description: SofaScore season ID

name: league_name
description: Human-readable league name

name: player_id
description: SofaScore player ID of the shooter

name: player_name
description: Name of the shooter

name: is_home
description: True if the shooter's team was the home side

name: minute
description: Match minute when the shot was taken

name: added_time
description: Added time minutes, if applicable

name: time_seconds
description: Seconds elapsed in the match at the moment of the shot

name: x
description: [Attacking] Shot origin X coordinate (0–100, left-to-right)

name: y
description: [Attacking] Shot origin Y coordinate (0–100, bottom-to-top)

name: goal_mouth_x
description: [Attacking] Goal mouth X coordinate where the shot was aimed

name: goal_mouth_y
description: [Attacking] Goal mouth Y coordinate where the shot was aimed

name: goal_mouth_z
description: [Attacking] Goal mouth height where the shot was aimed

name: goal_mouth_location
description: [Attacking] Descriptive location in the goal (e.g. low-right, top-centre, high-left)

name: block_x
description: [Defending] X coordinate where the shot was blocked

name: block_y
description: [Defending] Y coordinate where the shot was blocked

name: body_part
description: [Attacking] Body part used — right-foot / left-foot / head

name: shot_type
description: [Attacking] Outcome — goal / save / miss / blocked

name: situation
description: [Attacking] How the chance was created — assisted / regular / set-piece / counter

name: xg
description: [Attacking] Expected goals value for this shot — null in lower leagues

name: ingested_date
description: Audit — date row was written

name: ingested_at
description: Audit — exact timestamp row was written (UTC)
